testcase.name: Login with valid Credentials #1
testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: Login with valid Credentials # Features/Login.feature:11 Given User navigates to Login page. # stepdefination.Login.user_navigates_to_login_page() When User enteres valid email address pankajshirke901@gmail.com into the email field # stepdefination.Login.User_enteres_valid_email_into_email_address_field(java.lang.String) And User has entered Valid Password Test@12345 into the password # stepdefination.Login.user_has_entered_valid_password_into_the_password(java.lang.String) And User Clicks on Login Button # stepdefination.Login.user_clicks_on_login_button() Then User should get login successfully # stepdefination.Login.user_should_get_login_successfully()

testcase.name: Login with valid Credentials #2
testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: Login with valid Credentials # Features/Login.feature:12 Given User navigates to Login page. # stepdefination.Login.user_navigates_to_login_page() When User enteres valid email address pankajshirke933@gmail.com into the email field # stepdefination.Login.User_enteres_valid_email_into_email_address_field(java.lang.String) And User has entered Valid Password Test@12345 into the password # stepdefination.Login.user_has_entered_valid_password_into_the_password(java.lang.String) And User Clicks on Login Button # stepdefination.Login.user_clicks_on_login_button() Then User should get login successfully # stepdefination.Login.user_should_get_login_successfully()

testcase.name: Login with valid Credentials #3
testcase.system-out: Scenario Outline: Login with valid Credentials # Features/Login.feature:13 Given User navigates to Login page. # stepdefination.Login.user_navigates_to_login_page() When User enteres valid email address pankajshirke934@gmail.com into the email field # stepdefination.Login.User_enteres_valid_email_into_email_address_field(java.lang.String) And User has entered Valid Password Test@12345 into the password # stepdefination.Login.user_has_entered_valid_password_into_the_password(java.lang.String) And User Clicks on Login Button # stepdefination.Login.user_clicks_on_login_button() Then User should get login successfully # stepdefination.Login.user_should_get_login_successfully()

testcase.name: Login with Invalid Credentials
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Login with Invalid Credentials # Features/Login.feature:15 Given User navigates to Login page. # stepdefination.Login.user_navigates_to_login_page() When User enteres Invalid email address into the email field # stepdefination.Login.user_enteres_invalid_email_address_into_the_email_field() And User has entered InValid Password "Tes@12345" into the password # stepdefination.Login.user_has_entered_in_valid_password_into_the_password(java.lang.String) And User Clicks on Login Button # stepdefination.Login.user_clicks_on_login_button() Then User should get proper warning message for credential mismatch. # stepdefination.Login.user_should_get_proper_warning_message_for_credential_mismatch()

testcase.name: Login with valid email with Invalid Password
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Login with valid email with Invalid Password # Features/Login.feature:22 Given User navigates to Login page. # stepdefination.Login.user_navigates_to_login_page() When User enteres valid email address "pankajshirke901@gmail.com" into the email field # stepdefination.Login.User_enteres_valid_email_into_email_address_field(java.lang.String) And User has entered InValid Password "Tes@12345" into the password # stepdefination.Login.user_has_entered_in_valid_password_into_the_password(java.lang.String) And User Clicks on Login Button # stepdefination.Login.user_clicks_on_login_button() Then User should get proper warning message for credential mismatch. # stepdefination.Login.user_should_get_proper_warning_message_for_credential_mismatch()

testcase.name: Login with Invalid email with valid Password
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Login with Invalid email with valid Password # Features/Login.feature:29 Given User navigates to Login page. # stepdefination.Login.user_navigates_to_login_page() When User enteres Invalid email address into the email field # stepdefination.Login.user_enteres_invalid_email_address_into_the_email_field() And User has entered Valid Password "Tet@12345" into the password # stepdefination.Login.user_has_entered_valid_password_into_the_password(java.lang.String) And User Clicks on Login Button # stepdefination.Login.user_clicks_on_login_button() Then User should get proper warning message for credential mismatch. # stepdefination.Login.user_should_get_proper_warning_message_for_credential_mismatch()

testcase.name: User creates an account only with mandatory fields
testcase.system-out: Scenario: User creates an account only with mandatory fields # Features/Register.feature:3 Given User navigates to Register Account page. # stepdefination.Register.user_navigates_to_register_account_page() When User enters the details into the below fields # stepdefination.Register.user_enters_the_details_into_the_below_fields(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable) | firstName | Pankaj | | lastName | shirke | | telephone | 9604065837 | | password | Test@12345 | And User selects Privacy policy # stepdefination.Register.user_selects_privacy_policy() And User clicks on continue button # stepdefination.Register.user_clicks_on_continue_button() Then User Account should get created successfully. # stepdefination.Register.user_account_should_get_created_successfully()

testcase.name: User creates an account with all fields
testcase.system-out: Scenario: User creates an account with all fields # Features/Register.feature:16 Given User navigates to Register Account page. # stepdefination.Register.user_navigates_to_register_account_page() When User enters the details into the below fields # stepdefination.Register.user_enters_the_details_into_the_below_fields(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable) | firstName | Pankaj | | lastName | shirke | | telephone | 9604065837 | | password | Test@12345 | And User selects Yes for NewsLetter # stepdefination.Register.user_selects_yes_for_news_letter() And User selects Privacy policy # stepdefination.Register.user_selects_privacy_policy() And User clicks on continue button # stepdefination.Register.user_clicks_on_continue_button() Then User Account should get created successfully. # stepdefination.Register.user_account_should_get_created_successfully()

testcase.name: User creates duplicate account
testcase.system-out: Scenario: User creates duplicate account # Features/Register.feature:30 Given User navigates to Register Account page. # stepdefination.Register.user_navigates_to_register_account_page() When User enters the details into the below fields with duplicate email # stepdefination.Register.user_enters_the_details_into_the_below_fields_with_duplicate_email(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable) | firstName | Pankaj | | lastName | shirke | | email | shirkepankaj912@gmail.com | | telephone | 9604065837 | | password | Test@12345 | And User selects Yes for NewsLetter # stepdefination.Register.user_selects_yes_for_news_letter() And User selects Privacy policy # stepdefination.Register.user_selects_privacy_policy() And User clicks on continue button # stepdefination.Register.user_clicks_on_continue_button() Then User should get proper warning about duplicate email. # stepdefination.Register.user_should_get_proper_warning_about_duplicate_email()

testcase.name: User creates an account without filling fields
testcase.system-out: Scenario: User creates an account without filling fields # Features/Register.feature:46 Given User navigates to Register Account page. # stepdefination.Register.user_navigates_to_register_account_page() When User enters dont the details into the below fields. # stepdefination.Register.user_enters_dont_the_details_into_the_below_fields() And User clicks on continue button # stepdefination.Register.user_clicks_on_continue_button() Then User should get proper warning. # stepdefination.Register.user_should_get_proper_warning()

testcase.name: User Search for valid a valid Product
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: User Search for valid a valid Product # Features/Search.feature:3 Given User opens the application. # stepdefination.Search.user_opens_the_application() When User enteres valid product "hp" into searchbox field # stepdefination.Search.user_enteres_valid_product_into_searchbox_field(java.lang.String) And User clicks on search button. # stepdefination.Search.user_clicks_on_search_button() Then User should get valid product displayed in searchbox results # stepdefination.Search.user_should_get_valid_product_displayed_in_searchbox_results() java.lang.AssertionError at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:87) at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:96) at stepdefination.Search.user_should_get_valid_product_displayed_in_searchbox_results(Search.java:48) at ✽.User should get valid product displayed in searchbox results(classpath:Features/Search.feature:7)
Embedding User_Search_for_valid_a_valid_Product [image/png 93169 bytes]

testcase.name: User Search for Invalid a valid Product
testcase.system-out: Scenario: User Search for Invalid a valid Product # Features/Search.feature:10 Given User opens the application. # stepdefination.Search.user_opens_the_application() When User enteres Invalid product "honda" into searchbox field # stepdefination.Search.user_enteres_invalid_product_into_searchbox_field(java.lang.String) And User clicks on search button. # stepdefination.Search.user_clicks_on_search_button() Then User should get a message about no product matching. # stepdefination.Search.user_should_get_a_message_about_no_product_matching()

testcase.name: User Search without Product
testcase.system-out: Scenario: User Search without Product # Features/Search.feature:17 Given User opens the application. # stepdefination.Search.user_opens_the_application() When User dont enteres any product name into searchbox field # stepdefination.Search.user_dont_enteres_any_product_name_into_searchbox_field() And User clicks on search button. # stepdefination.Search.user_clicks_on_search_button() Then User should get a message about no product matching. # stepdefination.Search.user_should_get_a_message_about_no_product_matching()
